## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Security fix

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run type-check` passes with no new errors
- [ ] `npm run check` passes with no new Svelte errors
- [ ] `npm test -- --run` passes (all tests green)
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] New code that can be unit-tested has tests
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or PII committed
- [ ] Firestore security rules updated if new collections/paths added
- [ ] Rate limiting considered for new API endpoints
- [ ] Input validated and sanitized at all API boundaries
- [ ] `.env.example` updated if new environment variables added
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
